EKF minus AUKF (adaptive).sign_convention: first_minus_second; positive means the first method has larger held-out RMSE than the second method

UKF (fixed-noise) minus AUKF (adaptive).sign_convention: first_minus_second; positive means the first method has larger held-out RMSE than the second method

EKF minus UKF (fixed-noise).sign_convention: first_minus_second; positive means the first method has larger held-out RMSE than the second method

dbar_external_validation.external_label_definition: adaptation counterproductive iff the adaptive UKF held-out SP3 position RMSE exceeds the fixed-noise UKF held-out SP3 position RMSE by more than the predeclared 5% margin (external precise reference; not the DBAR statistic, not a simulator label)

power.note: Sensitivity rests on the positive class only; with a small positive class its Wilson interval is wide and no inferential claim is made.

caveat_metadata.reference: held-out state error against an independent ILRS analysis-centre SP3-c precise orbit product
caveat_metadata.compact_frame_description: GMST-only pseudo-inertial frame shared by station geometry and SP3 reference, without polar motion, nutation, or UT1-UTC EOP
caveat_metadata.interpretation: bounded public replay for relative compact-filter behavior; absolute magnitudes are model-mismatch stress numbers, not centimetre operational POD accuracy

caveats: Public bounded-reference replay of the compact real SLR/SP3 OD slice over the extended 80-arc temporal schedule including four preceding weeks. The compact OD uses a GMST-only frame and compact two-body+J2 dynamics, does not apply the full operational SLR correction stack, and is not operational POD.
